modules.name: version
modules.notes: Shared version read used by cluster inventory and status paths.

modules.name: cluster-core
modules.notes: Core cluster visibility and task-oriented reads.

modules.name: cluster-config
modules.notes: Use proxmox_api_call until typed cluster config tools are validated.

modules.name: cluster-mapping
modules.notes: Cluster PCI resource mappings enable non-root, REST-shaped passthrough workflows through mapping identifiers instead of raw host device IDs.

modules.name: cluster-firewall
modules.notes: Cluster firewall reads exist; mutating coverage remains generic-only.

modules.name: cluster-ha
modules.notes: HA should remain generic-only until lab-validated.

modules.name: cluster-sdn
modules.notes: Only listing is typed today.

modules.name: cluster-notifications
modules.notes: Future typed module after notification workflows are validated.

modules.name: cluster-metrics
modules.notes: Metrics endpoints are available but not yet typed.

modules.name: cluster-replication
modules.notes: Replication should become a dedicated module later.

modules.name: cluster-backup
modules.notes: Read coverage is typed; broader lifecycle coverage still generic-only.

modules.name: cluster-ceph
modules.notes: Cluster Ceph status is typed; write paths remain generic-only.

modules.name: access-users
modules.notes: User list is typed; create/update/token lifecycle is still generic-only.

modules.name: access-groups
modules.notes: Future typed group management.

modules.name: access-roles
modules.notes: Future typed role management.

modules.name: access-acl
modules.notes: ACL and permission inspection/mutation remain generic-only.

modules.name: access-realms
modules.notes: Realm and sync jobs remain generic-only.

modules.name: access-auth
modules.notes: Server-managed auth lifecycle is internal; user-facing typed auth tools are not yet productized.

modules.name: node-core
modules.notes: Covers node inventory and lifecycle reads/actions.

modules.name: node-storage
modules.notes: Snippet file CRUD still requires SSH/file fallback.

modules.name: node-network
modules.notes: Only network listing is typed today.

modules.name: node-disks
modules.notes: Disk and scan families remain generic-only.

modules.name: node-services
modules.notes: Task reads are typed; apt and service control remain generic-only.

modules.name: node-certificates
modules.notes: Candidate for artifact-backed certificate workflows later.

modules.name: node-apt
modules.notes: Any typed apt coverage must remain explicitly high risk.

modules.name: qemu-read
modules.notes: Includes template inspection because templates are QEMU resources.

modules.name: qemu-lifecycle
modules.notes: Low-level lifecycle and clone primitives are typed.

modules.name: qemu-config
modules.notes: Cloud-init dump currently uses `qm cloudinit dump` via approved CLI. PCI passthrough uses REST first and falls back to `qm set` only for the known root-only raw non-mapped `hostpci` case.

modules.name: qemu-guest-agent
modules.notes: Falls back to configured guest transports when guest agent is unavailable.

modules.name: qemu-console
modules.notes: Console ticketing is typed at a common console module level.

modules.name: qemu-boot-diagnostics
modules.notes: Boot diagnostics aggregate VM, guest-agent, cloud-init, and bounded node-side inspection signals. Bootstrap validation keeps known distro rules explicit.

modules.name: lxc-read
modules.notes: Container inventory and config/status reads are typed.

modules.name: lxc-lifecycle
modules.notes: Lifecycle actions are typed; broader provisioning remains generic-only.

modules.name: lxc-console
modules.notes: Console ticketing is shared with node and QEMU console flows.

modules.name: storage-core
modules.notes: Generic storage is REST-first; snippet file CRUD uses validated SSH/file fallback.

modules.name: backup
modules.notes: Cluster backup reads and node backup starts are typed.

modules.name: replication
modules.notes: No typed replication coverage yet.

modules.name: firewall
modules.notes: Read-only typed coverage across cluster/node/guest scopes.

modules.name: sdn
modules.notes: Only cluster-level list coverage is typed today.

modules.name: ceph
modules.notes: Only status reads are typed.

modules.name: ha
modules.notes: HA remains generic-only until validated.

modules.name: console-and-tasks
modules.notes: Proxmox console and task surfaces plus server-owned job wrappers.
